raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "rhetorical deflection that universalizes risk to neutralize a specific objection",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the objected-to thing carries no real danger",
    "every usable thing carries comparable danger",
    "singling out one item for its danger is therefore inconsistent or pointless"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as rhetoric; the parenthetical denial undercuts the subsequent generalization yet the move still functions to shift burden",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "audience accepts risk as an unremarkable background feature of all human artifacts and practices",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as a factual claim that literally no dangers exist or that all dangers are equivalent in kind and degree"
}
